name: Scallops Provencale
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse scallops in cold water; pat dry with paper towels.
2. On a sheet of waxed paper or on a paper plate, combine the flour, salt, and pepper. Dredge the scallops in the flour mixture, coating all sides and using up all of the mixture.
3. In a 12-inch nonstick skillet, combine the oils and heat over medium-high heat. Add the scallops and garlic and sauté until lightly browned. Reduce the heat, add the remaining ingredients, and cook until thoroughly heated.
